channel.title: Home on Muhammad Samir Assawalhy
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Muhammad Samir Assawalhy

item.title: Building Arabi.js — Arabizing JavaScript
item.description:
One of my most ambitious projects was Arabi.js — a tool that transforms JavaScript syntax to support Arabic keywords. The idea was simple but powerful: what if you could write JavaScript in Arabic?

The Motivation

As someone who grew up in Egypt, I noticed that many beginner programmers struggle with the English-centric nature of programming languages. While English proficiency is important in tech, the initial barrier of learning programming concepts AND a foreign language simultaneously can be overwhelming.

item.title: My Journey in Competitive Programming
item.description:
Competitive programming has been one of the most defining experiences of my university years. It all started in my first year at Zagazig University when a senior student introduced me to the ICPC community.

The Beginning

I remember the first time I tried solving a problem on Codeforces. It was a simple “A” problem, and it took me almost an hour to solve. But the feeling of seeing “Accepted” for the first time was incredible. That moment hooked me into the world of competitive programming.

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Education

B.S. in Computer and Systems Engineering — Zagazig University, Egypt
Sep 2019 – Jul 2024

  • GPA: 3.3 / 4 (84%)
  • Achieved 1st place among university teams in ICPC competitions for three consecutive years

Skills

Programming Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Bash, CSS, Sass, OOP, Functional Programming

Frameworks: React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Cypress · Working knowledge of Django, Laravel

Others: Linux, GNU tools, Git, Docker, Kubernetes, Databases, SQL, Monorepos

Achievements

  • ACPC Finalist (2022, 2023, 2024): Qualified to the African and Arab Collegiate Programming Championship
  • NASA Space Apps (Nov 2023): Team Pyroguardians got 3rd place and became a global nominee
  • IEEEXtreme 17.0 (Oct 2023): Top 15 teams out of 198 Egyptian teams

Extra-Curricular Activities

Mentor and Instructor — ICPC Community at Zagazig University

Mar 2022 – Aug 2024

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Feel free to reach out to me via email or connect with me on social media.
